title: Operation: Starcleave
description: Cleave open the sky, and unite Earth with the Heavens.
body:
## **Operation: Starcleave**

![The Sky is torn apart. Stars are visible beyond the Rift. The world around is bathed in Rainbow Hues, and the blocks have been Warped by Starlight.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/6EXJCB46/images/86a087a6405e421c8740d83653a8c78fdba72c78.png)

_... is a mod about **Reaching for the Stars**, and the **Unification of Heavens and Earth**._

---

### Summary

The mod acts similarly to a **dimension mod**, but _**without the separate dimension**_.

Instead, you can **Terraform preexisting areas** of your World into a **Celestial Landscape**, by triggering a series of _(theoretically)_ deliberate **_quasi-natural disasters_**.

---

_See the sights, meet your New Neighbours, and Plunder the Landscape for all of its resources..._

![The Sky is Torn open, beyond lies a Sea of Stars. The Rift shines a Rainbow Light, and the trees turn a pale pink. Flying squid-like beings fill the air.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/6EXJCB46/images/696f252f9679e303f8039ca8d29e4735ce8e499a.png)

_... all from the convenience of your backyard\*!_

_\*note: breaking open Heaven in your backyard, or anywhere close to anything you hold dear, is not recommended._

## Introduction: When Heavens Broke
_It began with the **Starcleaver Golem**. With a mining drill, firework jetpack, and inbuilt storage, it would have been the Perfect autonomous asteroid miner..._

![Starcleaver Golem flies upwards](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/6EXJCB46/images/716fbd18ab2ea700f85d1bdcb7662e12a0412a31.png)

_Alas, the Golem could never reach its goal.
As we watched it shoot drill-first into the Cosmos, it met some sort of Resistance From Above..._

![There is a hole in the Sky. Beyond it are Stars, below it is a Rainbow Hue.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/6EXJCB46/images/1bbf338ef35f798d3e085f8ea9a04d9f79770d41.png)

_... and we could do nothing but watch as the Heavens tore Open._

_An opalescent Fog filled the air. Under that alien Starlight, the land was **Bleached**._

![The land has been Starbleached. The grass is a glorious sickly yellow, and the trees are a bleached pink.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/6EXJCB46/images/17ab10ea7e8a403ad361da8fa6bebd425fdfc771.png)

_As the ground twisted beneath our feet, we saw the grass painted in a sickly yellow splendor, and the trees were locked within a lifeless sheen._

_Our World was drenched in **Rainbow Hues**..._

![A large cavern has been etched into the land. Along its sides run lines of a dark green material, and its base is splattered with patches of bright green plasma.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/6EXJCB46/images/c61d367e1f97dd82acd24df2a939401dc076499b.png)

... and a hint of **Nuclear Green**.

# Features

Operation: Starcleave currently adds the following main features:
- **Starcleaver Golem**: By placing a **Netherite Pumpkin** atop a block of **Crying Obsidian**, you can form a batch of **Starcleaver Golems**. By filling one with **A Few Pieces of Gunpowder** and starting its fuse with a **Flint and Steel**, it will sail towards the heavens...

- **Firmament Fractures**: Formed by the drill of a **Starcleaver Golem** when it attempts to Leave into the Cosmos. The **Fracture** will show a glimpse into the **Starlit Sea Above**.

- **Nucelosyntheseeds**: _Green_ seeds, spawned by the **Nuclear Stormclouds** emitted after a **Firmament Fracture** is formed. Upon landing, they grow and burrow into the ground. They then wait there... _dormant_.

- **Starbleaching**: Areas beneath **Fractured Firmament** will be bathed in **Rainbow Hues**. Land engulfed in this Starlight will gradually become **Starbleached**. This will transform the terrain, and convert existing blocks into their **Heavenly counterparts**.

- **Subcaelic Torpedoes**: Beneath the Shattered Sky, mob spawns will be replaced by Celestial Beings. The **Subcaelic Torpedoes** resemble flying Squids, and spew _Mysterious Rainbow Trails_ across the land. They follow their leader, the **Subcaelic Dux**.
- **Subcaelic Dux**: The **Dux** is a **neutral miniboss**. When angered it will send its **Torpedoes** at those who stand against it. Upon death, it will give you a... _"reward"_... if you see _Green_, Run.

And _a handful of items, blocks, and minor mechanics_, derived from **Fractures** and their **Consequences**, such as:
- Some really **Stellar Farmland**, albeit with a chance of turning your crops into **Bismuth**.
- **Bismuth Pegasus Armor**, to give your Horse **Wings**.
- Magic Rainbow fire that **Burns Underwater** (keep it away from the _Green_).
- The ability to **Collect Starbleach in a Cauldron**, and then **cover your food in Starbleach**. (and also your Ender Pearls.)
- **Blessed Cloth** blocks - to break your fall.
- A **Very Comfortable Bed**.
